name: Sri Satyanarayan Puja
tagline: Attract immense peace, health, and financial security to your household.
description: The Satyanarayan Puja is performed to seek the blessings of Lord Vishnu, the preserver of the universe. It is traditionally performed on full moon days (Purnima) or on major milestones to express gratitude, clear obstacles, and manifest abundance and harmony inside the home.
significance: The Puja represents the devotion to Truth (Satya). Reciting and listening to the Satyanarayan Katha cleanses absolute home energies, instills positivity, and ensures well-being for family members.
mantraMeaning: "Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevay" - Salutations to the Lord of the Universe, who dwells in the hearts of all.

packages.name: Katha & Sankalp (E-Puja)

benefits: Live interactive Zoom/Meet with Pandit Ji
Sankalp taken with your Family Gothra & Names
Detailed explanation of Satyanarayan Katha
Digital Mantra booklet and Arti recording

name: Griha Pravesh Puja (Housewarming)
sanskritName: गृह प्रवेश पूजा एवं वास्तु शांति
tagline: Cleanse and bless your new home with prosperity, positive energy, and happiness.
description: Before stepping into a newly constructed or freshly rented house, it is vital to perform Vastu Shanti and Griha Pravesh Pujas. This ritual pacifies malefic cosmic coordinates, wards off evil presences, and charges the entire domestic space with vibrant welfare energy.
significance: Ensures the protection of residents against structural or karmic flaws (Vastu Dosha) and establishes a blissful gateway for prosperity, warmth, and safe living.
mantraMeaning: "Om Vastu Purushaya Namah" - Salutations to the Divine Spirit dwelling in this structure, protect our household.

name: Maha Rudrabhishek Puja
tagline: Wash away past karmas, neutralize planetary doshas, and embrace Lord Shiva’s grace.
description: Rudrabhishek is one of the most powerful Vedic rituals to appease Lord Shiva in his fiery form (Rudra). It involves pouring selected pure substances (liquid stream) like cow milk, sugarcane juice, honey, curd, and coconut water over the Shiva Lingam while chanting the powerful Sri Rudram.
significance: Cleanses spiritual pathways, overcomes chronic health struggles, dispels enemies, resolves negative planetary transitions (Sani / Rahu), and restores absolute peace of mind.
mantraMeaning: "Om Namah Shivaya" - Adorations to the Auspicious and Destroyer of all dualities.

packages.name: E-Abhishek & Shiv Sankalp

name: Ganesh-Lakshmi Business Puja
sanskritName: लक्ष्मी-गणेश पूजन एवं श्री सूक्त यज्ञ
tagline: Bless your starting venture, warehouse, or home office with fortune and clear blockages.
description: A special puja designed to invite the goddess of wealth (Lakshmi) and the lord of Intellect and obstacle-removal (Ganesha) into your workspace, showroom, store, or office. Excellent for Diwali, New Ventures, or when starting a financial fiscal cycle.
significance: Eradicates business inertia, attracts deep customer footprints, brings financial wisdom to avoid debt, and encourages structural business growth.
mantra: ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं क्लीं कमलवासिन्यै स्वाहा
mantraMeaning: "Om Shreem Hreem Kleem Kamalavasinyai Swaha" - Sacred mantra invoking Goddess Lakshmi residing on the lotus of pure consciousness.

name: Maha Mrityunjaya Healing Jaap
tagline: Restore health longevity, eradicate heavy illnesses, and invoke divine healing shields.
description: This powerful healing jaap invokes Lord Shivas immortal energy to safeguard health. Highly recommended for family members going through intense surgeries, chronic ailments, acute mental depressants, or dealing with birth-chart hazards.
significance: Protects against premature mishaps and fatal health crashes. Promotes continuous bio-energetic repair, emotional balance, and physical resilience.
mantra: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम्। उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान्मृत्योर्मुक्षीय माऽमृतात्॥
mantraMeaning: "Om Tryambakam Yajamahe..." - We worship the Three-Eyed One, fragrant and nurturing all. May He liberate us from death and disease, even as a cucumber is severed from its vine.
